home.title: Deepvac | Thermal Vacuum Systems for Space Qualification
home.description: Deepvac develops modular and custom thermal vacuum systems for aerospace qualification, thermal cycling, and space environment simulation. Engineered in Germany.

products.description: Standardized and custom-engineered thermal vacuum systems for aerospace qualification, environmental simulation, and research applications.

mechanicalDesign.description: Engineering of chamber assemblies, interfaces, fixturing, and mechanical integration concepts for thermal vacuum systems.

retrofitModernization.title: TVAC Retrofit & Modernization | Deepvac
retrofitModernization.description: Technical upgrades for legacy thermal vacuum systems to improve reliability, safety, control precision, and lifecycle value.

maintenanceRepair.description: Diagnostics, preventive servicing, repair, and technical support for thermal vacuum chamber systems.

subsystemIntegration.description: Integration of thermal, vacuum, instrumentation, and control subsystems into coherent test environments.
